outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran deal is 'largely negotiated' as White House goes on lockdown after gunshots reported outside
outlets.summary: Trump posted on Truth Social that a deal with Iran is 'largely negotiated' and the Strait of Hormuz will be opened. The announcement came as the White House was locked down after 20-25 gunshots were reported outside the perimeter.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran agreement 'largely negotiated' — but core impasse over enriched uranium remains
outlets.summary: CNN live updates cover Trump's Truth Social post claiming a deal is 'largely negotiated,' while noting that Mojtaba Khamenei's HEU red line and Trump's demand for uranium transfer remain mutually incompatible.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump says deal with Iran including opening Strait of Hormuz is 'largely negotiated'
outlets.summary: NPR reports Trump's most optimistic public framing of Iran deal progress to date. Pakistan's Army Chief Munir completed a 24-hour marathon mediation in Tehran. Israel excluded from talks; Netanyahu calls emerging MOU 'very bad.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' after Hegseth West Point speech warning: 'We may send you to war'
outlets.summary: Fox News live coverage: Trump's Truth Social deal announcement follows Hegseth's West Point commencement address where he told graduates 'we are sending you, perhaps, to war.' Army hit 2026 recruiting goals four months early.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: EXCLUSIVE: Iran deal to be announced within 24 hours — White House lockdown after gunshots may delay
outlets.summary: Washington Times exclusively reported the deal draft was approved by Vance, Witkoff, Kushner and Iran's Ghalibaf — expected announcement within 24 hours. White House security lockdown after gunshots may complicate timeline.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: White House locked down after gunshots outside perimeter as Trump works on Iran deal
outlets.summary: White House placed in security lockdown after 20-25 gunshots reported outside the perimeter. Journalists on North Lawn ordered to shelter in briefing room. Trump was inside with NSC team reviewing Iran deal.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump says deal 'largely negotiated' as Israel kills 16 in Lebanon strikes
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera live coverage: Trump posts 'largely negotiated' deal claim; simultaneously Israel struck 6 Lebanese towns killing 16+ despite ceasefire; Hezbollah FPV drones destroyed Iron Dome launchers at Biranit.

outlets.name: BBC News
outlets.headline: Gunshots outside White House as Trump announces Iran deal 'largely negotiated'
outlets.summary: BBC reports on the collision of Trump's upbeat Iran deal posting and the White House security lockdown following gunshots outside. Pakistan's mediator Munir completed a 24-hour marathon in Tehran.

outlets.name: The Guardian
outlets.headline: US-Iran deal 'largely negotiated' — but nuclear impasse, Israel exclusion, and White House lockdown cloud announcement
outlets.summary: The Guardian analysis: Trump's optimistic framing faces three obstacles — Mojtaba Khamenei's HEU red line, Netanyahu calling the MOU 'very bad,' and a White House security lockdown that may delay a formal announcement.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu calls emerging Iran MOU 'very bad' for Israel as Trump posts deal 'largely negotiated'
outlets.summary: Times of Israel reports Netanyahu convened an emergency coalition meeting describing the emerging MOU as 'very bad' — it omits nuclear dismantlement, HEU export, and proxy rollback. Israel is entirely excluded from negotiations.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Hezbollah FPV drones strike Iron Dome launchers at Biranit as Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated'
outlets.summary: Jerusalem Post confirms Hezbollah released footage of FPV kamikaze drones striking Iron Dome batteries at Biranit/Jal al-Alam. Simultaneously Trump posted deal is 'largely negotiated.' IDF silent on damage.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Iran, Pakistan send revised war-ending proposal to U.S. — deal or new strikes by Memorial Day
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports Pakistan's Gen. Munir delivered a fresh Iranian counter-proposal to Washington. Netanyahu's emergency cabinet cited specific objections: no HEU export requirement, no proxy rollback, no nuclear dismantlement.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran FM: Differences with US 'deep and significant' despite Trump's deal announcement
outlets.summary: Press TV: IRGC coordinated safe passage of 25 commercial vessels through Hormuz in 24 hours. Araghchi said differences with US remain 'deep and significant.' Iran insists HEU cannot leave Iranian soil under any deal.

outlets.name: Tasnim News
outlets.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei directive: Iran's 440 kg of enriched uranium is a sovereign asset, will not leave Iran
outlets.summary: Tasnim News confirms Mojtaba Khamenei issued a formal directive that Iran's approximately 440 kg of 60%-enriched uranium cannot leave Iranian territory under any agreement — directly contradicting Trump's stated demand.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: LIVE — Trump says deal 'largely negotiated' as Israel kills 16 in Lebanon amid ceasefire
outlets.summary: Iran International live: Trump posts deal 'largely negotiated' on Truth Social; IRGC coordinates 25-ship Hormuz transit; White House locked down; Israel kills 16+ in Lebanon strikes. Araghchi says differences remain 'deep and significant.'
